findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'daq grant management system (gms)' (5x); 'community and destination zev infrastructure program' (4x).

findings.description: Heading hierarchy broken: 'January 13, 2025' is rendered as <h1> (appearing twice) when it is a deadline callout, not a document-level title. This creates hierarchy jumps from h2→h3→h1, misrepresenting nesting.
findings.evidence:
HTML: '

You MUST apply for GMS access no later than

January 13, 2025

' — In the PDF (pages 12 and 36), 'January 13, 2025' is emphasized red text within a section, not the top-level document heading.

findings.description: URL text altered: a hyphen was inserted between 'DAQ' and 'grants' in a URL, changing the displayed and linked address.
findings.evidence: PDF page 19: 'https://deq.nc.gov/DAQgrants-management' — HTML: 'https://deq.nc.gov/DAQ-grants-management'. The hyphen between 'DAQ' and 'grants' is not present in the PDF text.

findings.description: Email address 'daq.NC_VWGrants@deq.nc.gov' appears as plain text in the HTML in multiple locations (subscribe sections and 'Where to get more information' section), whereas in the PDF it appears as hyperlinked/colored text.
findings.evidence: HTML subscribe section: 'to daq.NC_VWGrants@deq.nc.gov.' — plain text, no tag. HTML final section: 'E-mail questions to: daq.NC_VWGrants@deq.nc.gov' — plain text. PDF pages 22, 38, 40 show this email in link-colored text.

findings.description: DC Fast Funding Levels table structure altered. The PDF table uses merged cells for 'Or (whichever is less)' spanning all data rows and has a hierarchical header with 'Reimbursement Amount (Per Port)' spanning Government/Non-Government sub-headers. The HTML flattens this into 8 individual columns with the condition text repeated in every row and the hierarchical header replaced by long dash-separated column names.
findings.evidence: PDF page 9: 'Or (whichever is less)' appears as a single merged area spanning 4 rows under Government-Owned and Non-Government-Owned headers. HTML: 8 separate <th> elements (e.g., 'Reimbursement Amount (Per Port) - Government-Owned Property (Condition)') and 'Or (whichever is less)' repeated in each <td> row. All data values are intact.

findings.description: The href URL for the VW-Community-Destination link differs from the display text URL visible in the PDF. The HTML injects a long URL not shown in the PDF text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 40 shows 'https://deq.nc.gov/VW-Community-Destination' as both display text and link. HTML: 'https://deq.nc.gov/VW-Community-Destination' — the href URL is not visible anywhere in the PDF.
